## nsc instance extend-duration

Extends the duration of a instance.

```
nsc instance extend-duration [instance-id] [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --duration duration         For how long to extend the ephemeral environment. (default 0s)
      --ensure_minimum duration   Ensure that the target instance has a minimum of the specified duration. (default 0s)
  -h, --help                      help for extend-duration
```
